faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get your questions answered
faq.a1: A Squad is a team of AI agents that work together to complete a task. Each agent has a specific role, such as writer, editor, or designer, and they collaborate to produce high-quality content.
faq.q2: Do I need to know how to code?
faq.a2: No! Our platform is 100% visual. You choose the squad, configure the options, and execute. All complex work is done by the agents automatically.
faq.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a3: Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time, without penalties or additional fees.
faq.a4: Checkpoint allows you to pause squad execution at any time to review the generated content. You can approve it, request adjustments, or cancel the execution.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your squads and content from one place
